title: WebSocket connection establishment with tokio-tungstenite
purpose: Establish the core WebSocket connection capability — connecting to OpenAI Responses API endpoints over wss:// with rustls TLS, proper handshake headers, compression, and ping/pong handling. This brief builds the connection primitive that the pool (PW-005) and framing (PW-007) briefs build on.
task: Add tokio-tungstenite as a direct dependency in the norn crate. Create openai/websocket.rs with a WsConnection struct wrapping tokio-tungstenite's WebSocket stream. Implement connection establishment to both api.openai.com and chatgpt.com endpoints with URL scheme swapping (https → wss), the OpenAI-Beta responses_websockets header, auth headers from AuthProvider::auth_headers (PW-002), permessage-deflate compression, and automatic ping/pong.

requirements.title: tokio-tungstenite dependency
requirements.spec: The norn crate Cargo.toml SHALL declare tokio-tungstenite as a direct dependency with rustls-tls features. No new external crates beyond tokio-tungstenite SHALL be introduced.
acceptance: cargo check --workspace passes with the new dep

requirements.title: WsConnection struct
requirements.spec: openai/websocket.rs SHALL define a WsConnection struct wrapping the tokio-tungstenite WebSocketStream. The struct SHALL track establishment time via std::time::Instant for age-based reconnection in PW-008.
acceptance: Wraps WebSocketStream with TLS (MaybeTlsStream or equivalent)
established_at: Instant field set at construction time
Struct is Send (required for Arc<Mutex<_>> usage in pool)

requirements.title: URL scheme swapping
requirements.spec: WHEN establishing a WS connection THE SYSTEM SHALL convert the base URL from https:// to wss:// and append /responses to form the WebSocket endpoint URL.

requirements.title: Handshake headers
requirements.spec: WHEN performing the WS upgrade handshake THE SYSTEM SHALL include the OpenAI-Beta header from the WS_BETA_VERSION constant AND SHALL include auth headers from AuthProvider::auth_headers.
acceptance: WS_BETA_VERSION constant defined with value responses_websockets=2026-02-06
OpenAI-Beta header set in the upgrade request
Bearer token and chatgpt-account-id (when available) set via auth_headers

requirements.title: TLS and compression
requirements.spec: WHEN connecting via wss:// THE SYSTEM SHALL use rustls for TLS AND SHALL enable permessage-deflate compression in the WebSocket config.
acceptance: Ping/pong frames handled automatically by tokio-tungstenite

requirements.title: Module declaration
requirements.spec: openai/mod.rs SHALL declare mod websocket so the new module is compiled.

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement the connection pool — that is PW-005 scope
SHALL NOT implement request/response framing — that is PW-007 scope
SHALL NOT implement transport selection or fallback — that is PW-010 scope
SHALL NOT implement connection lifecycle (age tracking, reconnection) — that is PW-008 scope
verification: openai/websocket.rs exists with WsConnection struct and connect function
tokio-tungstenite appears in norn Cargo.toml deps
